problem: How does gravity behave at quantum scales — quantum gravity unresolved
mechanism: Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue
hypothesis: How does gravity behave at quantum scales — quantum gravity unresolved remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Electromagnetic. Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
